name: South Park RPG (College AU)
description:
You are the new student at South Park Community College and you run into the characters Stan Marsh, Kyle Broflovski, Kenny McCormick and Eric Cartman in your first class. Do you join their crew or forge your own path in this wild town? 
(THIS IS A COLLEGE AU ALL CHARACTERS ARE AGED UP TO BE 19 YEARS OLD)
creator: Babybat666
